nodes.name: White-plumed honeyeater
nodes.summary: White-plumed honeyeater（White-plumed honeyeater，学名 Ptilotula penicillata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于傑拉爾頓，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽、滩涂。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 傑拉爾頓
nodes.summary: 傑拉爾頓是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥、White-plumed honeyeater、白胸鸲鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: carteri occurs in the Pilbara region of WA from Geraldton to the Fortescue Ranges, and east to the Western Deserts; while P

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: An oligotypic species, it is mainly found in open sclerophyll woodland, often near water sources, such as wetlands, swamps, creeks, and dams. It is found extensively in river red gum woodlands, but also riparian woodlands dominated by Eucalyptus, Melaleuca or Casuarina species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: An oligotypic species, it is mainly found in open sclerophyll woodland, often near water sources, such as wetlands, swamps, creeks, and dams. It is found extensively in river red gum woodlands, but also riparian woodlands dominated by Eucalyptus, Melaleuca or Casuarina species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It may also be found in nearby river flats or open forest and woodland.{{cite journal |last1=Ford |first1=H.A
